summary: Tested Konekt B2B critical fixes for product pricing and quote management. Fixed search bug where text filter was applied after DB limit. All backend tests pass (6/6). Frontend features verified: QuotesPage clean list, CantFindWhatYouNeedBanner inline form working.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in /api/public-marketplace/products: Text search filter was applied AFTER the DB limit, causing search results to miss products beyond the limit. Now uses MongoDB $regex in query for efficient server-side filtering.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All critical fixes verified: (1) GET /api/public-marketplace/products returns products with selling_price computed from base_price via pricing engine. A5 Notebook: base=8000, sell=10400 (~30% margin). (2) Search now uses MongoDB $regex for efficient server-side filtering. (3) Products with status='active'/'published'/'approved' OR is_active=true are returned. (4) QuotesPage at /admin/quotes shows clean list with search, status badges, actions. Create Quote button navigates to /admin/quotes/new. (5) CantFindWhatYouNeedBanner on /marketplace has inline form that submits to POST /api/public/quote-requests with source='marketplace_cta'. Success message shown after submission.

ProductPricingEngine.details: Products with base_price get selling_price computed via calculate_sell_price. A5 Notebook: base=8000, sell=10400 (30% margin)

ProductSearch.details: Fixed: Search now uses MongoDB $regex for server-side filtering. GET /api/public-marketplace/products?q=A5 returns A5 Notebook with price

ProductStatusFilter.details: Uses $or query: is_active=true OR status in ['active','published','approved']

QuotesPage.details: Clean list view with search, status badges, actions. Create Quote button navigates to /admin/quotes/new

CantFindWhatYouNeedBanner.details: Inline form on /marketplace submits to POST /api/public/quote-requests. Success message shown after submission

bug_fix_applied.issue: Text search filter was applied after DB limit, causing search to miss products
bug_fix_applied.fix: Changed to use MongoDB $regex in query for server-side filtering before limit is applied
